records.question: Which ECE departments are in room 105 of the Barton building, belong to the EN division, have a phone number at most 7033, and include members with a Primary appointment type?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
WHERE department.dname = 'ECE' AND department.dphone <= 7033 AND department.room = '105' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.building = 'Barton'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Department.DNO
FROM Department
JOIN Member_of ON Department.DNO = Member_of.DNO
WHERE Department.DName LIKE '%ECE%'
  AND Department.Room = '105'
  AND Department.Building = 'Barton'
  AND Department.Division = 'EN'
  AND Department.DPhone <= 7033
  AND Member_of.Appt_Type = 'Primary'

records.question: Which departments have the name 'ECE' and division 'EN' that also offer courses held on 'W' days and have students with minors in them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE department.dname = 'ECE' AND department.division = 'EN' AND course.days = 'W'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Department.DNO
FROM Department
JOIN Course ON Department.DNO = Course.DNO
JOIN Minor_in ON Department.DNO = Minor_in.DNO
WHERE Department.DName = 'ECE'
  AND Department.Division = 'EN'
  AND Course.Days LIKE '%W%'
GROUP BY Department.DNO

records.question: Which departments located in room 245 have students minoring in them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
JOIN student ON minor_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE department.room = '245'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Department.DNO
FROM Department
JOIN Minor_in ON Department.DNO = Minor_in.DNO
WHERE Department.Room = '245'
GROUP BY Department.DNO

records.question: Which ECE departments in the EN division have room 105, a phone number of at least 7033, offer courses exactly 2 hours long on MTW, and include members with a Primary appointment type?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
WHERE department.dphone >= 7033 AND course.hours = '2' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.room = '105' AND department.dname = 'ECE' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND course.days = 'MTW'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Department.DNO
FROM Department
JOIN Course ON Department.DNO = Course.DNO
JOIN Member_of ON Department.DNO = Member_of.DNO
WHERE Department.DName = 'ECE'
  AND Department.Division = 'EN'
  AND Department.Room = '105'
  AND Department.DPhone >= 7033
  AND Course.Days = 'MTW'
  AND (
      (instr(Course.Hours, '-') > 0 AND
       (CAST(substr(Course.Hours, instr(Course.Hours, '-') + 1) AS INTEGER) - CAST(substr(Course.Hours, 1, instr(Course.Hours, '-') - 1) AS INTEGER)) = 2)
      OR
      (instr(Course.Hours, '-') = 0 AND CAST(Course.Hours AS INTEGER) = 2)
  )
  AND Member_of.Appt_Type = 'Primary'
GROUP BY Department.DNO
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Course.CID) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT Member_of.FacID) > 0

records.question: What departments in division AS have a phone number of at least 7119 and offer both courses and minors?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE department.division = 'AS' AND department.dphone >= 7119
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Department.DNO
FROM Department
WHERE Division = 'AS'
  AND DPhone >= 7119
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Course
      WHERE Course.DNO = Department.DNO
  )
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM Minor_in
      WHERE Minor_in.DNO = Department.DNO
  )

records.question: Which departments are located in building Krieger, division AS, room 381, have a department phone number at most 7119, and include faculty member Salzberg who has a phone number at most 2641 and holds a Secondary appointment?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN faculty ON member_of.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE department.building = 'Krieger' AND department.division = 'AS' AND department.room = '381' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Secondary' AND faculty.phone <= 2641 AND faculty.lname = 'Salzberg' AND department.dphone <= 7119
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Department.DNO
FROM Department
JOIN Member_of ON Department.DNO = Member_of.DNO
JOIN Faculty ON Member_of.FacID = Faculty.FacID
WHERE Department.Building = 'Krieger'
  AND Department.Division = 'AS'
  AND Department.Room = '381'
  AND Department.DPhone <= 7119
  AND Faculty.Lname = 'Salzberg'
  AND Faculty.Phone <= 2641
  AND Member_of.Appt_Type = 'Secondary'
